title: The Desert March Continues
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on the desert march continues, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Desert March Continues. The journey through the desert continues, mixing exhaustion, danger, and Vivi’s memories of the country she is trying to save. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You saw the sandstorm just now, didn't you... Well, let me tell you that sandstorm wasn't the first one this town's had...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ever since the drought started 3 years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This town's been regularly hit by sandstorms!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And because of that, the oasis is now in the sorry state you see before you.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Trade caravans have since stopped coming here,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And the rebels realized they couldn't hold out here any longer,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So they relocated to Katorea and set up their main base there.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Katorea?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Why, where's that, Vivi?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's an oasis town beside Namohama!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Beside Nanohana!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then what the hell did we come all the way out here for!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Vivi...? Did you say Vivi just now...?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: S-She's not princess VIV! if that's what you're thinking!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Shut up!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Umm... No, I'm not...

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Vivi? Princess Vivi, is that really you...?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: ...Who?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm so glad to see you're still alive! it's me! Don't you recognize me!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Guess I can't blame you, I did lose quite a bit of weight...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Is that you, Toto?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yes...!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Gasp!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Toto?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Vivi... I still believe... I still believe in the king!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He's not the type that could ever betray his country and subjects...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm right, aren't I...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Those rebels are all out of their minds!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: PLEASE! You have to stop them...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're the only one who can!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...Vivi, you better grow up to be a good princess!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Toto...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alubanna, 11 years ago

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: The town dried up...!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Village boy, Kouza

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Why didn't you help us!?

summary: This part develops the desert march continues and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
